_comment: Provenance metadata for Eight Extreme Daos (set of 8) (八极道). Auto-generated from canon database. Every item answers: Where did this originate? Who made it? When? Why? How old? What cultivation? Current owner? Known history?
name: Eight Extreme Daos (set of 8)
origin: Self-comprehended (first 5 by Empyrean Trial; last 3 on 5th Heaven-Trampling bridge)

abilities: 8 Daos: Extreme Water, Metal, Wood, Earth, Fire, Heaven, Land, Life
First 5 = Five Elements; 6th & 7th = mutually opposing; 8th = life-bound Dao
